class.name: CSVReader
class.brief_description: Streaming CSV reader with Variant conversion.
class.description: CSVReader wraps [DSVReader] and converts each streamed field with [method CSVImporter.parse_record]. It can return each row as an [Array] or, when headers are enabled, as a [Dictionary] keyed by the first accepted row.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the current file and resets the reader.

method.name: get_error
method.description: Returns the last error from the underlying [DSVReader].

method.name: get_header_names
method.description: Returns the header names read from the first accepted row when [member headers] is enabled.

method.name: get_line
method.description: Returns the current one-based input line number.

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the current file length in bytes, or [code]0[/code] when no file is open.

method.name: get_position
method.description: Returns the current file byte position, or [code]0[/code] when no file is open.

method.name: is_eof
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the file has been fully read and no parsed rows remain.

method.name: open
method.description: Opens [param file_path] for streaming reads. If [param headers] is [code]true[/code], the first accepted row is consumed as dictionary keys. If [param cast_fields] is [code]true[/code], each field is converted to a Variant.

method.name: read_row
method.description: Reads one row. Returns an [Array] when [member headers] is [code]false[/code], a [Dictionary] when [member headers] is [code]true[/code], or [code]null[/code] at EOF or after an error.

method.name: read_rows
method.description: Reads up to [param max_rows] rows. If [param max_rows] is [code]0[/code], reads until EOF.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], streamed fields are converted with [method CSVImporter.parse_record].
If [code]true[/code], the first accepted row is used as dictionary keys for later rows.
